Crypto Payment Infrastructure

Beyond the
crypto
card.

SpendX connects digital assets to everyday finance. Top up with any crypto from 50+ blockchains — spend globally in USD. Cards, wallets, DeFi yield and B2B solutions, all in one platform.

Core Value

Infrastructure at the
intersection of crypto & finance

Seamless Payments
Instant crypto-to-fiat conversion at the moment of top-up. Select any asset, send it — USD lands on your card automatically, fees shown upfront.
Global Access
Accepted wherever debit cards work — online and offline. Built on secure, regulated payment infrastructure with full KYC and AML compliance from day one.
Reliable Infrastructure
SpendX is the infrastructure layer between the blockchain economy and regulated finance — not a bank, but the bridge connecting them. Built for scale.
Native Web3
Fully non-custodial. Connect MetaMask, WalletConnect, or any Web3 wallet. Interact with DeFi protocols directly from the dashboard — SpendX never holds your private keys.
Process

How it works

Register, verify once, top up in any crypto — spend worldwide in USD.

Create account

Direct crypto transfer

Open a multi-chain wallet directly in your dashboard. Store assets, manage balances, top up your card anytime.

Platform Capabilities

Everything in one platform

50+ Blockchain Networks
Any asset, any chain — cross-chain routing via LiFi aggregator. Instant conversion to USD at top-up.
Virtual & Physical Cards
Virtual card on KYC approval. Physical card worldwide. Apple Pay & Google Pay compatible.
Multi-Chain Wallet
Connect MetaMask, WalletConnect and others via Privy. Sign smart contracts via dashboard. Non-custodial model.
DeFi Yield Products
Yield strategies via smart-contract protocols. Coming Soon. Requires wallet connection. Not bank deposits.
On-Ramp Solutions
Buy crypto with bank card or transfer. Coming Soon. Fiat-to-crypto on-ramp via API integration.
B2B Infrastructure
White-label card solutions and API integrations for corporate partners. Scalable B2B crypto treasury management.

Your crypto.

News & Updates

Latest from SpendX

Platform updates, partnerships, and announcements.

+
Mar 15, 2026 Update
Multi-chain top-up now live: 50+ blockchains supported

The integration with LI.FI aggregator enables users to top up their SpendX card from any blockchain with automatic routing and conversion. Supported networks include Ethereum, BNB Chain, Solana, Tron, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, Base, zkSync, Fantom, Gnosis, Celo, and many more. The system finds the optimal route for each transaction, ensuring the best conversion rate and lowest gas fees. All top-ups are converted to USD instantly and credited to the card in real time.

+
Mar 10, 2026 Partnership
SpendX partners with Privy for Web3 wallet authentication

Privy provides enterprise-grade authentication for Web3 applications. Through this partnership, SpendX users can securely link their MetaMask, WalletConnect, Coinbase Wallet, and other self-custodial wallets to the SpendX dashboard. Once connected, one-click top-ups become available — select an amount, approve the transaction in your wallet, and USD lands on your card instantly. Privy handles the authentication layer with SOC 2 Type II compliance, ensuring the highest security standards for wallet connections.

+
Feb 28, 2026 Announcement
Physical cards now shipping worldwide

Physical SpendX cards are now available for Supreme ($150) plan holders with worldwide delivery via tracked shipping. Each card features NFC contactless technology for tap-to-pay at any compatible terminal. Cards are compatible with Apple Pay and Google Pay — simply add your SpendX card to your phone wallet for instant mobile payments. The card includes a magnetic stripe, EMV chip, and holographic security features. Delivery typically takes 7-14 business days depending on your location.

Archive

SpendX now supports direct top-ups from over 50 blockchains including Ethereum, Solana, Arbitrum, Base, and more. Powered by LI.FI integration for seamless cross-chain conversion.
Mar 10, 2026 Partnership
SpendX partners with Privy for Web3 wallet authentication+
Users can now connect MetaMask, WalletConnect, and other Web3 wallets directly through the SpendX dashboard using Privy's secure authentication layer.
Feb 28, 2026 Announcement
Physical cards now shipping worldwide+
Supreme plan holders can now order physical SpendX cards with worldwide delivery. Full NFC support for contactless payments, Apple Pay and Google Pay compatible.
Feb 15, 2026 Update
Apple Pay & Google Pay integration launched+
All SpendX virtual cards now support Apple Pay and Google Pay. Add your card to your phone wallet and pay contactlessly at any NFC terminal worldwide.
Jan 20, 2026 Announcement
SpendX platform goes live+
After months of development and testing, SpendX officially launches its crypto payment infrastructure platform. Registration is now open for all users worldwide.
FAQ

Frequently
Asked Questions.

Can't find the answer you need? Our support team is here to help.

Contact support

SpendX LLC is a fintech company at the intersection of crypto infrastructure, stablecoin settlements, and digital payments. The company issues crypto-linked payment cards (virtual and physical) and builds an integrated ecosystem connecting digital assets, banking instruments, and Web3 in one unified interface.

Positioned as an infrastructure layer between the blockchain economy and the regulated financial system. Incorporated in Dubai, UAE — Meydan Grandstand, Nad Al Sheba. License No. 2528382.01.

SpendX offers both physical and virtual cards across five plans: Essential ($25), Plus ($35), Prime ($75), Supreme ($150), and Business ($150). Each tier has its own daily and monthly spending limits and top-up fee.

Anywhere Mastercard or Visa is accepted — online and in-store, at 100M+ merchants worldwide.

There are 4 ways to top up your SpendX Card — all convert to USD and land on your card instantly.

1. Direct stablecoin transfer — Send USDT or USDC from any wallet or exchange directly to your unique SpendX deposit address on TRX, BSC, or SOL networks. No conversion needed — stablecoins arrive as USD on your card.

2. Any crypto, any chain — Top up with 500+ tokens across 50+ blockchains. Simply select your asset and network — SpendX automatically converts it to USD at the best available rate. No bridging, no manual steps.

3. Connect MetaMask or any hot wallet — Link your MetaMask or WalletConnect wallet directly in the dashboard. Approve the transaction in your wallet — funds are converted and credited instantly.

4. Built-in SpendX Wallet — Use the multi-chain wallet built into your SpendX dashboard. Store, manage and top up your card from one place — without connecting any external wallet.

Your card is activated automatically after completing KYC verification and purchasing the card. No manual steps required.

The SpendX Card is issued in USD, but you can pay in any currency worldwide. Exchange rates are determined by the banks involved in the transaction.

Via our integration with LI.FI, SpendX supports 50+ blockchains and hundreds of tokens. You can top up using assets from Ethereum, BNB Chain, Solana, Tron, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, Base, zkSync... and many more. The platform automatically routes and converts your crypto to USD at the point of top-up — no manual bridging needed.

Yes — SpendX is fully KYC-compliant. You need a valid ID card, passport, or residence permit. It is a one-time process required before card issuance.

Most verifications complete quickly. If selected for manual review it may take up to 72 hours. Your virtual card is issued immediately after approval.

Many similarly named websites exist. Use only our official site: spend-x.com. All official social media accounts carry verification badges.

Top-up fees range from 2.0% to 3.5% depending on your plan. Always shown before confirming — no hidden charges.

Many services charge up to 8.33% hidden fees at purchase. SpendX charges only the stated top-up fee — your full balance is always usable.

SpendX is a full payment infrastructure platform — multi-chain wallet, MetaMask/WalletConnect integration via Privy, DeFi yield on idle assets, on-ramp solutions, and B2B tools. All in one place.

Earn returns on idle crypto via DeFi smart-contract protocols. Coming Soon — requires wallet connection to dashboard. Not bank deposits — risk disclosures apply.
